query:
SELECT cp.period, cp.is_bad_debt_row, cp.paid_amount
FROM collected_payments cp
JOIN collected_cache cc ON cp.collected_id = cc.id
WHERE cc.contract_external_id = 'CT0225-LRI001-9357-01'
ORDER BY cp.period;
